name: Item-custom_boxes_per_unit
label: Boxes per Unit
description: Physical boxes one unit of this SKU ships in, for D2C AWB planning. 0 = nestable accessory (packs inside a parent appliance's box), 1 = own box (default), 2+ = multi-box combo shipped in that many parcels (e.g. airfryer + slow juicer = 2). Order AWBs = sum of this over all lines x qty (floored at 1).

name: Delivery Note-custom_d2c_defer_si
label: Defer Sales Invoice (D2C automation)
description: Set to 1 by the D2C release automation. While 1, the 'Auto Create SI on Shopify DN Submit' script SKIPS this DN so no invoice is raised at submit (the DN exists only to produce the AWB + label for packing). The SHPSI27 invoice is created later, after physical dispatch, via the evening D2C Invoice Run (invoice-after-dispatch). Manual sheet-flow DNs leave this 0 and invoice at submit as before.

name: Delivery Note-custom_shopify_fulfilled
label: Shopify Fulfilled
description: Set by the D2C label-fetch job once the Shopify fulfillment + tracking is pushed. Prevents re-pushing.

name: Delivery Note-custom_box_count
label: D2C Box Count
description: Expected physical boxes for this D2C order (from the box model). The AWB guard blocks label/invoice/dispatch if fewer AWBs are minted.

name: Delivery Note-custom_awb_shortfall
label: AWB Shortfall (held)
description: Set when the courier minted fewer AWBs than D2C Box Count — the DN is HELD (not labelled/invoiced/dispatched) until fixed.
